hooks.command: SESSION=$(tmux display-message -p -t "$TMUX_PANE" '#S / #W' 2>/dev/null || echo 'terminal'); osascript -e "display notification \"Claude finished\" with title \"Claude Code\" subtitle \"$SESSION\""

SESSION=$(tmux display-message -p -t "$TMUX_PANE" '#S / #W' 2>/dev/null || echo 'terminal'); osascript -e "display notification \"Claude needs input\" with title \"Claude Code\" subtitle \"$SESSION\""
